style_prefix: Modern pixel art game sprite, chibi proportions with big head and compact body, clean dark outlines, limited but punchy color palette, subtle cel shading, charming and expressive, solid pure white background, no grid lines, no graph paper, no checkered pattern, no scenery, character only, inspired by modern indie pixel art and motion graphics pixel characters

assets.name: background
assets.prompt: BACKGROUND SCENE ONLY, NOT A CHARACTER, NOT AN OBJECT. Highly detailed pixel art background of the inside of a volcano crater, tall vertical composition, open sky at the top with volcanic smoke and orange glow, dark rocky volcano walls on left and right with cracks showing glowing magma underneath, charred rocks and volcanic stone textures, warm dramatic lighting from below, deep reds oranges and dark grays, the very bottom of the image shows a rocky volcanic floor with cracks of glowing lava seeping through, no platforms no characters no creatures no foreground objects, atmospheric and dramatic but colorful, game background for a side-scrolling platformer, high detail

assets.name: background-simple
assets.prompt: BACKGROUND SCENE ONLY, NOT A CHARACTER, NOT AN OBJECT. Pixel art background of the inside of a volcano, simple composition, dark volcanic rock walls fading into the edges, glowing molten lava cracks running through the rock, warm red and orange ambient glow filling the space, heat haze and embers floating, no detailed platforms no characters no creatures, feels like being deep inside a volcano, atmospheric and warm, simpler and less detailed than a hero illustration but still clearly a volcanic interior

assets.name: title-logo
assets.prompt: NOT A CHARACTER. Pixel art game logo, the text PARTICLE PANIC in two lines, bold chunky blocky letters, PARTICLE on top line PANIC on bottom line, fiery orange and yellow gradient colors, dark outlines on each letter, small ember sparks around the text, solid white background, text logo only, no characters no creatures no objects
